name: Spaghetti Sauce with Ribs & Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 1 green bell pepper, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Empty the tomato puree into an 8-quart non-aluminum pot.
2. Add water from two empty cans to the tomato puree.
3. In a blender, process another 1/4 can of water, one seeded green bell pepper, and 2 cloves of garlic until liquified. Add this mixture to the tomato puree.
4. Add anise, 2 teaspoons salt, 1/2 teaspoon black pepper, 1 tablespoon basil, 1 tablespoon oregano, and 1 tablespoon parsley flakes to the sauce. Bring to a boil and simmer.
5. Thoroughly brown ribs on all sides in a separate skillet. Turn off the heat; do not drain the fat. Transfer ribs to a bowl and set aside.
6. Combine ground beef and Italian sausage in a mixing bowl.
7. In a blender, process eggs, 2 cloves of garlic, seeded green bell pepper until liquified. Add this mixture to the meat mixture along with remaining spices, bread crumbs, and Parmesan cheese. Mix well.
8. Form the mixture into meatballs and brown them thoroughly in the same skillet used for the ribs. Set aside with the ribs.
9. In a separate saucepan, scorch tomato paste on high heat for one to two minutes until some of the paste sticks and turns black. Add the two 12-oz cans of water and scrape the bottom of the pan to loosen any scorched paste.
10. Pour this mixture into the simmering sauce with ribs and meatballs. Continue simmering for a minimum of three hours, stirring occasionally. For best results, refrigerate after cooking and reheat the next day.
